/usr/bin/ar qc libydlidar_sdk.a CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/base/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/common/ydlidar_def.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/network/ActiveSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/network/PassiveSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/network/SimpleSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/serial/impl/unix/list_ports_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/serial/impl/unix/unix_serial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/serial/impl/windows/list_ports_win.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/serial/impl/windows/win_serial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/core/serial/serial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/src/CYdLidar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/src/ETLidarDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/src/filters/NoiseFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/src/ydlidar_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ydlidar_sdk.dir/sdk/src/ydlidar_sdk.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libydlidar_sdk.a
